info.description:
Payment gateway aggregator — VA, QRIS, and disbursement via Midtrans, Xendit, DOKU, iPaymu.

## Authentication
Merchant endpoints (/v1/*): `X-API-Key` header with your API key (`wpay_live_*` or `wpay_test_*`).
Admin endpoints (/admin/*): `Authorization: Bearer <access_token>` from POST /admin/login.

## Idempotency
Payment and disbursement creation support `Idempotency-Key` header. Use unique key per request to safely retry.

## Webhook
Wanpey signs outbound webhooks with `X-Wanpey-Signature` (HMAC-SHA256). Verify using your webhook secret.
info.title: Wanpey Payment Gateway API

get.description: Returns all admin accounts. Roles: super_admin only.

post.description: Creates a new admin account. Roles: super_admin only.

patch.description: Deactivates an admin account. Cannot deactivate yourself. Roles: super_admin only.

get.description: Returns paginated disbursements across all merchants. Roles: all admin roles.
Returns disbursement detail by ID across all merchants.
Returns the platform's global default fee applied when a merchant has no custom contract. Roles: super_admin, finance.

put.description: Updates the platform's global default fee. Mandatory reason for audit trail. Roles: super_admin, finance.

get.description: Returns all configured holiday surcharges. Roles: super_admin, finance.

post.description: Adds a fee surcharge for a specific date (e.g. public holiday). Roles: super_admin, finance.

put.description: Updates an existing holiday surcharge (can toggle active state). Roles: super_admin, finance.

get.description: Returns Wanpey's platform margin added on top of base fees. Roles: super_admin, finance.

put.description: Updates Wanpey's margin on top of all fees. Can be toggled on/off per method. Roles: super_admin only.

post.description: Authenticates an admin and returns access + refresh tokens. Access token expires based on config (default 8h). Never distinguish wrong email vs wrong password in errors.

get.description: Returns the authenticated admin's profile and role.

patch.description: Changes the authenticated admin's password. Requires current password for verification.

get.description: Returns paginated list of all merchants. Roles: all admin roles.

post.description: Registers a new merchant. Returns API key once — store it securely. Roles: super_admin, ops.

get.description: Returns merchant detail by ID. Roles: all admin roles.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a merchant. Data is retained for audit. Roles: super_admin.

post.description: Generates a new API key for a merchant and invalidates the old one. Raw key shown once. Roles: super_admin, ops.

patch.description: Activates a pending merchant so they can start transacting. Roles: super_admin, ops.

get.description: Returns all bank accounts for a merchant including verification status.

patch.description: Marks a merchant's bank account as verified. Only verified accounts can receive disbursements. Roles: super_admin, ops.
Sets the maximum total disbursement amount per day in IDR. 0 = unlimited. Roles: super_admin, finance.
Permanently deactivates a merchant. Roles: super_admin, ops.
Sets custom VA, QRIS, and disbursement fees for a merchant. Reason is mandatory for audit trail. Roles: super_admin, finance.
Suspends an active merchant — blocks new transactions. Roles: super_admin, ops.

get.description: Returns paginated ledger mutations across all merchants. Roles: super_admin, finance.
Returns paginated payments across all merchants. Roles: all admin roles.
Returns payment detail by ID across all merchants.
Returns platform's known balance at each payment provider. Roles: super_admin, finance.

patch.description: Manually records the platform's balance at a specific provider (for reconciliation). Roles: super_admin, finance.

post.description: Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access + refresh token pair.

get.description: Returns paginated list of disbursements for the authenticated merchant.

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, processing, completed, failed
parameters.name: status

post.description: Sends funds from merchant balance to a registered verified bank account. The bank account must be verified by admin before use. Daily cashout limit applies if configured.

parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate disbursements on retry
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

422.description: Bank account not verified or daily limit exceeded

get.description: Returns full disbursement detail including status, bank account info, and fee breakdown.
Returns the authenticated merchant's profile, status, and configuration.

patch.description: Updates merchant name, webhook URL, or other profile fields. FeeConfig cannot be changed here — contact admin.

post.description: Generates a new API key and immediately invalidates the old one. The raw key is shown only once — store it securely.

get.description: Returns all registered bank accounts for the authenticated merchant (max 3).

post.description: Registers a new bank account for disbursement. Max 3 accounts per merchant. New accounts must be verified by admin before they can receive disbursements.

delete.description: Removes a registered bank account. Cannot remove the primary account if other accounts exist.

patch.description: Marks a bank account as the primary account for disbursements.

get.description: Returns outbound webhook delivery history for this merchant — useful for debugging failed deliveries.
Returns paginated ledger mutations (credits and debits) for the authenticated merchant.
Returns the merchant's current spendable balance in IDR (calculated live from ledger).
Returns a single ledger mutation by ID.
Returns paginated list of payments for the authenticated merchant.

parameters.description: Filter by status: pending, paid, expired, cancelled, failed
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: Filter by provider: midtrans, xendit, doku, ipaymu
parameters.name: provider

post.description: Creates a QRIS payment and returns a QR code string for the customer to scan.

parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate payments on retry
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.description: Creates a VA payment via the specified provider. Returns VA number and bank details for the customer to pay.

parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate payments on retry
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

get.description: Returns full payment detail including status, VA/QR data, and fee breakdown.

delete.description: Cancels a pending payment. Uses a two-step process (pending → cancelling → cancelled) for financial safety. Only pending payments can be cancelled.

422.description: Payment is already in a final state

surcharge.description: additional fee for ALL methods on this date

balanceIDR.description: last known balance; updated after settlement or manual reconciliation
